subject.title: [MCPClientError]: Server's protocol version is not supported: 2025-11-25
subject.body:
### Description

Trying to connect to wrike mcp (https://www.wrike.com/app/mcp/sse) and received:
```Server's protocol version is not supported: 2025-11-25```

I saw there was an [issue](https://github.com/vercel/ai/issues/7575) regarding an earlier version.

The supported versions can be seen here: https://github.com/vercel/ai/blob/ccc5f51bcbc9116fe5430fe4de6bf2003f4f95a5/packages/mcp/src/tool/types.ts#L5-L10

### AI SDK Version

This is in main, all `ai` packages are affected


### Code of Conduct

- [x] I agree to follow this project's Code of Conduct
